title: Kinematics
subject: physics
summary: Kinematics describes motion without focusing on forces.
SPTG usually tests constant acceleration, free fall, and basic interpretation.
coreConcepts: Acceleration is the rate of change of velocity.
For constant acceleration, standard motion equations apply.
Free fall is motion under gravity only.
derive: a = (v - u) / t, so v = u + at
Average velocity = (u + v) / 2 for constant acceleration
Combining equations gives s = ut + (1/2)at² and v² = u² + 2as

sptgSet.question: An object starts from rest with acceleration 10 m/s² for 2 s. Find v.
A car moves at constant speed 10 m/s for 5 s. Find distance.
An object is dropped from rest. Which acceleration acts on it?
u = 5 m/s, a = 2 m/s², t = 4 s. Find v.
u = 0, a = 10 m/s², t = 3 s. Find s.
A body slows from 20 m/s to 0 in 4 s. Find acceleration.
u = 10 m/s, a = 2 m/s², s = 24 m. Find v.
An object is thrown upward at 20 m/s. Using g = 10 m/s², find time to highest point.
A train accelerates from 0 to 30 m/s in 10 s. Find average velocity.
A particle moves with u = 3 m/s, a = 4 m/s², t = 2 s. Find s.

hardSet.question: A car accelerates from 10 m/s to 30 m/s over 100 m. Find acceleration.
A body moves with u = 20 m/s and decelerates at 2 m/s². Find stopping distance.
A particle moves 5 s with u = 4 m/s and a = 2 m/s². Find final velocity and distance.
An object is thrown upward at 30 m/s. Find max height using g = 10 m/s².
A car covers first half of distance at 20 m/s and second half at 30 m/s. Is average speed 25 m/s?
A body starts from rest and covers 80 m in 4 s. Find acceleration.
u = 15 m/s, v = 5 m/s, a = -2 m/s². Find time and distance.
A stone is dropped and reaches the ground in 3 s. Find height with g = 10 m/s².
An object moves at 8 m/s for 3 s, then accelerates at 2 m/s² for 4 s. Find total distance.
A train accelerates uniformly from 12 m/s to 20 m/s in 4 s. Find displacement.
